turns.content: We dropped the legacy MCP tool descriptions entirely. Only the AutoResearch-optimized versions ship — the old description text is gone from src/server.ts and the registration code.
Good — keeping both around was the kind of dead code that slowly accumulates drift, and the optimized descriptions hit the 25/25 score ceiling so there's no reason to retain the legacy strings.

query: Are legacy MCP tool descriptions still supported?
expected_answer: No — dropped; only AutoResearch-optimized versions ship.
